DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_RANK]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_RANK]
( 
	[RankID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[Rank] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LeadWeight] [float]  NULL,
	[LP_RankID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
